input.background: What is the probability a study with n=10 will detect a mean difference of 300 grams in birth weight in the SIDS population compared to the general population?
input.question: Let us assume σ=720 and use a two-sided α-level of 0.05.

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

mean_difference.description: Mean difference in birth weight between the SIDS population and the general population.

sigma.description: Standard deviation of birth weight in the population.

alpha.description: Significance level for the two-sided test.

power.description: Probability of detecting the specified mean difference in birth weight.
